226	class MultiLevelCascadeAttentionWrapper:
227	    r"""Attention wrapper for memory efficient multi-level cascade inference, this API assumes all
228	    levels KV-Cache are stored in a unified paged table.
229	
230	    Please check :ref:`cascade-inference-data-layout` for data layout in cascade inference.
231	    Note that it's not always beneficial to increase the number of levels because of the overhead
232	    of merging attention results.
233	
234	    The idea of cascade inference is introduced in our `blog post <https://flashinfer.ai/2024/02/02/cascade-inference.html>`_.
235	
236	    Example
237	    -------
238	    >>> import torch
239	    >>> import flashinfer
240	    >>> num_layers = 32
241	    >>> num_qo_heads = 64
242	    >>> num_kv_heads = 8
243	    >>> head_dim = 128
244	    >>> page_size = 16
245	    >>> # allocate 128MB workspace buffer
246	    >>> workspace_buffer = torch.empty(128 * 1024 * 1024, dtype=torch.uint8, device="cuda:0")
247	    >>> wrapper = flashinfer.MultiLevelCascadeAttentionWrapper(
248	    ...     2, workspace_buffer, "NHD"
249	    ... )
250	    >>> batch_size = 7
251	    >>> shared_kv_num_pages = 512
252	    >>> unique_kv_num_pages = 128
253	    >>> total_num_pages = shared_kv_num_pages + unique_kv_num_pages
254	    >>> shared_kv_page_indices = torch.arange(shared_kv_num_pages).int().to("cuda:0")
255	    >>> shared_kv_page_indptr = torch.tensor([0, shared_kv_num_pages], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0")
256	    >>> unique_kv_page_indices = torch.arange(shared_kv_num_pages, total_num_pages).int().to("cuda:0")
257	    >>> unique_kv_page_indptr = torch.tensor(
258	    ...     [0, 17, 29, 44, 48, 66, 100, 128], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
259	    ... )
260	    >>> shared_kv_last_page_len = torch.tensor([page_size], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0")
261	    >>> # 1 <= kv_last_page_len <= page_size
262	    >>> unique_kv_last_page_len = torch.tensor(
263	    ...     [1, 7, 14, 4, 3, 1, 16], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
264	    ... )
265	    >>> kv_cache_at_layer = [
266	    ...     torch.randn(
267	    ...         total_num_pages, 2, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda:0"
268	    ...     ) for _ in range(num_layers)
269	    ... ]
270	    >>> qo_indptr_arr = [
271	    ...     torch.tensor([0, batch_size], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"),  # top-level for shared KV-Cache
272	    ...     torch.arange(batch_size + 1, dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0")    # bottom-level for unique KV-Cache
273	    ... ]
274	    >>> # create auxiliary data structures for batch decode attention
275	    >>> wrapper.plan(
276	    ...     qo_indptr_arr,
277	    ...     [shared_kv_page_indptr, unique_kv_page_indptr],
278	    ...     [shared_kv_page_indices, unique_kv_page_indices],
279	    ...     [shared_kv_last_page_len, unique_kv_last_page_len],
280	    ...     num_qo_heads,
281	    ...     num_kv_heads,
282	    ...     head_dim,
283	    ...     page_size,
284	    ... )
285	    >>> outputs = []
286	    >>> for i in range(num_layers):
287	    ...     q = torch.randn(batch_size, num_qo_heads, head_dim).half().to("cuda:0")
288	    ...     # compute batch decode attention, reuse auxiliary data structures for all layers
289	    ...     o = wrapper.run(q, kv_cache_at_layer[i])
290	    ...     outputs.append(o)
291	    ...
292	    >>> outputs[0].shape
293	    torch.Size([7, 64, 128])
294	
295	    See Also
296	    --------
297	    BatchPrefillWithPagedKVCacheWrapper
298	    """
299	
300	    @flashinfer_api
301	    def __init__(
302	        self,
303	        num_levels,
304	        float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor,
305	        kv_layout: str = "NHD",
306	        use_cuda_graph: bool = False,
307	        qo_indptr_buf_arr: Optional[List[torch.Tensor]] = None,
308	        paged_kv_indptr_buf_arr: Optional[List[torch.Tensor]] = None,
309	        paged_kv_indices_buf_arr: Optional[List[torch.Tensor]] = None,
310	        paged_kv_last_page_len_buf_arr: Optional[List[torch.Tensor]] = None,
311	    ) -> None:
312	        r"""Constructor of :class:`MultiLevelCascadeAttentionWrapper`.
313	
314	        Parameters
315	        ----------
316	        num_levels : int
317	            The number of levels in the cascade attention.
318	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
319	            The user reserved float workspace buffer used to store intermediate attention results
320	            in the split-k algorithm. The recommended size is 128MB, the device of the workspace
321	            buffer should be the same as the device of the input tensors.
322	        kv_layout : str
323	            The layout of the input k/v tensors, could be either ``NHD`` or ``HND``.
324	        use_cuda_graph : bool
325	            Whether to use CUDA graph to capture the kernels, if enabled, the auxiliary data structures
326	            will be stored in provided buffers.
327	        qo_indptr_buf_arr : Optional[List[torch.Tensor]]
328	            An array of qo indptr buffers for each level, the array length should be equal to
329	            the number of levels.
330	            The last element of each tensor should be the total number of queries/outputs.
331	        paged_kv_indptr_buf_arr : Optional[List[torch.Tensor]]
332	            An array of paged kv-cache indptr buffers for each level, the array length should be
333	            equal to the number of levels.
334	        paged_kv_indices_buf_arr : Optional[List[torch.Tensor]]
335	            An array of paged kv-cache indices buffers for each level, the array length should be
336	            equal to the number of levels.
337	        paged_kv_last_page_len_buf_arr : Optional[List[torch.Tensor]]
338	            An array of paged kv-cache last page length buffers for each level, the array length
339	            should be equal to the number of levels.
340	        """
341	        self._use_cuda_graph = use_cuda_graph
342	        if use_cuda_graph:
343	            self._batch_prefill_wrappers = [
344	                BatchPrefillWithPagedKVCacheWrapper(
345	                    float_workspace_buffer,
346	                    kv_layout,
347	                    use_cuda_graph=True,
348	                    qo_indptr_buf=qo_indptr_buf,
349	                    paged_kv_indptr_buf=paged_kv_indptr_buf,
350	                    paged_kv_indices_buf=paged_kv_indices_buf,
351	                    paged_kv_last_page_len_buf=paged_kv_last_page_len_buf,
352	                )
353	                for (
354	                    qo_indptr_buf,
355	                    paged_kv_indptr_buf,
356	                    paged_kv_indices_buf,
357	                    paged_kv_last_page_len_buf,
358	                ) in zip(
359	                    qo_indptr_buf_arr,
360	                    paged_kv_indptr_buf_arr,
361	                    paged_kv_indices_buf_arr,
362	                    paged_kv_last_page_len_buf_arr,
363	                    strict=True,
364	                )
365	            ]
366	        else:
367	            self._batch_prefill_wrappers = [
368	                BatchPrefillWithPagedKVCacheWrapper(float_workspace_buffer, kv_layout)
369	                for _ in range(num_levels)
370	            ]
371	        self._num_levels = num_levels
372	        self._kv_layout = kv_layout
373	
374	    @property
375	    def is_cuda_graph_enabled(self) -> bool:
376	        return self._use_cuda_graph
377	
378	    def reset_workspace_buffer(
379	        self,
380	        float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor,
381	        int_workspace_buffers: List[torch.Tensor],
382	    ) -> None:
383	        r"""Reset the workspace buffer.
384	
385	        Parameters
386	        ----------
387	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
388	            The new float workspace buffer, the device of the new float workspace buffer should
389	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
390	
391	        int_workspace_buffers : List[torch.Tensor]
392	            The array of new int workspace buffer, the device of the new int workspace buffer should
393	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
394	        """
395	        for wrapper, int_workspace_buffer in zip(
396	            self._batch_prefill_wrappers, int_workspace_buffers, strict=True
397	        ):
398	            wrapper.reset_workspace_buffer(float_workspace_buffer, int_workspace_buffer)
399	
400	    @flashinfer_api
401	    def plan(
402	        self,
403	        qo_indptr_arr: List[torch.Tensor],
404	        paged_kv_indptr_arr: List[torch.Tensor],
405	        paged_kv_indices_arr: List[torch.Tensor],
406	        paged_kv_last_page_len: List[torch.Tensor],
407	        num_qo_heads: int,
408	        num_kv_heads: int,
409	        head_dim: int,
410	        page_size: int,
411	        causal: bool = False,
412	        pos_encoding_mode: str = "NONE",
413	        use_fp16_qk_reduction: bool = False,
414	        sm_scale: Optional[float] = None,
415	        window_left: int = -1,
416	        logits_soft_cap: Optional[float] = None,
417	        rope_scale: Optional[float] = None,
418	        rope_theta: Optional[float] = None,
419	        q_data_type: str = "float16",
420	        kv_data_type: Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]] = None,
421	    ):
422	        r"""Create auxiliary data structures for multi-level cascade attention for multiple
423	        forward calls within the same decode step. Please check
424	        :ref:`cascade-inference-data-layout` for data layout in cascade inference.
425	
426	        Parameters
427	        ----------
428	        qo_indptr_arr : List[torch.Tensor]
429	            An array of qo indptr tensors for each level, the array length should be equal to
430	            the number of levels.
431	            The last element of each tensor should be the total number of queries/outputs.
432	        paged_kv_indptr_arr : List[torch.Tensor]
433	            An array of paged kv-cache indptr tensors for each level, the array length should be
434	            equal to the number of levels.
435	        paged_kv_indices_arr : List[torch.Tensor]
436	            An array of paged kv-cache indices tensors for each level, the array length should be
437	            equal to the number of levels.
438	        paged_kv_last_page_len : List[torch.Tensor]
439	            An array of paged kv-cache last page length tensors for each level, the array length
440	            should be equal to the number of levels.
441	        num_qo_heads : int
442	            The number of query/output heads.
443	        num_kv_heads : int
444	            The number of key/value heads.
445	        head_dim : int
446	            The dimension of the heads.
447	        page_size : int
448	            The page size of the paged kv-cache.
449	        causal : bool
450	            Whether to apply causal mask to the attention matrix.
451	            This is only effective when :attr:`custom_mask` is not provided in
452	            :meth:`plan`.
453	        pos_encoding_mode : str
454	            The position encoding applied inside attention kernels, could be
455	            ``NONE``/``ROPE_LLAMA`` (LLAMA style rotary embedding) /``ALIBI``.
456	            Default is ``NONE``.
457	        use_fp16_qk_reduction : bool
458	            Whether to use f16 for qk reduction (faster at the cost of slight precision
459	            loss).
460	        window_left : int
461	            The left (inclusive) window size for the attention window, when set to ``-1``, the window
462	            size will be set to the full length of the sequence. Defaults to ``-1``.
463	        logits_soft_cap : Optional[float]
464	            The attention logits soft capping value (used in Gemini, Grok and Gemma-2, etc.), if not
465	            provided, will be set to ``0``. If greater than 0, the logits will be capped according to
466	            formula:
467	            :math:`\texttt{logits_soft_cap} \times \mathrm{tanh}(x / \texttt{logits_soft_cap})`,
468	            where :math:`x` is the input logits.
469	        sm_scale : Optional[float]
470	            The scale used in softmax, if not provided, will be set to
471	            ``1.0 / sqrt(head_dim)``.
472	        rope_scale : Optional[float]
473	            The scale used in RoPE interpolation, if not provided, will be set to
474	            ``1.0``.
475	        rope_theta : Optional[float]
476	            The theta used in RoPE, if not provided, will be set to ``1e4``.
477	        q_data_type : Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]]
478	            The data type of the query tensor. If None, will be set to torch.float16.
479	        kv_data_type : Optional[Union[str, torch.dtype]]
480	            The data type of the key/value tensor. If None, will be set to :attr:`q_data_type`.
481	        """
482	        for i, (
483	            wrapper,
484	            qo_indptr,
485	            paged_kv_indptr,
486	            paged_kv_indices,
487	            paged_kv_last_page_len,
488	        ) in enumerate(
489	            zip(
490	                self._batch_prefill_wrappers,
491	                qo_indptr_arr,
492	                paged_kv_indptr_arr,
493	                paged_kv_indices_arr,
494	                paged_kv_last_page_len,
495	                strict=True,
496	            )
497	        ):
498	            wrapper.plan(
499	                qo_indptr,
500	                paged_kv_indptr,
501	                paged_kv_indices,
502	                paged_kv_last_page_len,
503	                num_qo_heads,
504	                num_kv_heads,
505	                head_dim,
506	                page_size,
507	                causal=causal if i == self._num_levels - 1 else False,
508	                pos_encoding_mode=pos_encoding_mode,
509	                use_fp16_qk_reduction=use_fp16_qk_reduction,
510	                sm_scale=sm_scale,
511	                window_left=window_left,
512	                logits_soft_cap=logits_soft_cap,
513	                rope_scale=rope_scale,
514	                rope_theta=rope_theta,
515	                q_data_type=q_data_type,
516	                kv_data_type=kv_data_type,
517	            )
518	
519	    begin_forward = plan
520	
521	    @flashinfer_api(trace=multi_level_cascade_run_trace)
522	    def run(
523	        self,
524	        q: torch.Tensor,
525	        paged_kv_cache: torch.Tensor,
526	    ):
527	        r"""Compute multi-level cascade attention.
528	
529	        Parameters
530	        ----------
531	        q : torch.Tensor
532	            The query tensor, shape: ``[batch_size, num_qo_heads, head_dim]``.
533	        paged_kv_cache : Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]]
534	            The paged KV-Cache stored as a tuple of tensors or a single tensor:
535	
536	            * a tuple ``(k_cache, v_cache)`` of 4-D tensors, each with shape:
537	              ``[max_num_pages, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is ``NHD``,
538	              and ``[max_num_pages, num_kv_heads, page_size, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``.
539	
540	            * a single 5-D tensor with shape:
541	              ``[max_num_pages, 2, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if
542	              :attr:`kv_layout` is ``NHD``, and
543	              ``[max_num_pages, 2, num_kv_heads, page_size, head_dim]`` if
544	              :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``. Where ``paged_kv_cache[:, 0]`` is the key-cache and
545	              ``paged_kv_cache[:, 1]`` is the value-cache.
546	        """
547	        out, lse = self._batch_prefill_wrappers[-1].run(
548	            q,
549	            paged_kv_cache,
550	            return_lse=True,
551	        )
552	        for wrapper in self._batch_prefill_wrappers[:-1]:
553	            out_i, lse_i = wrapper.run(q, paged_kv_cache, return_lse=True)
554	            merge_state_in_place(out, lse, out_i, lse_i)
555	
556	        return out
557	
558	    forward = run
559	
560	
561	class BatchDecodeWithSharedPrefixPagedKVCacheWrapper:
562	    r"""Wrapper class for decode attention with shared-prefix paged kv-cache for batch
563	    of requests. The shared-prefix KV-Cache was stored in a standalone tensors, and the
564	    unique KV-Cache of each request was stored in a paged KV-Cache data structure.
565	
566	    Check :ref:`our tutorial<kv-layout>` for page table layout.
567	
568	    Warning
569	    -------
570	    This API will be deprecated in the future, please use
571	    :class:`MultiLevelCascadeAttentionWrapper` instead.
572	
573	    Example
574	    -------
575	    >>> import torch
576	    >>> import flashinfer
577	    >>> num_layers = 32
578	    >>> num_qo_heads = 64
579	    >>> num_kv_heads = 8
580	    >>> head_dim = 128
581	    >>> max_num_pages = 128
582	    >>> page_size = 16
583	    >>> # allocate 128MB workspace buffer
584	    >>> workspace_buffer = torch.empty(128 * 1024 * 1024, dtype=torch.uint8, device="cuda:0")
585	    >>> wrapper = flashinfer.BatchDecodeWithSharedPrefixPagedKVCacheWrapper(
586	    ...     workspace_buffer, "NHD"
587	    ... )
588	    >>> batch_size = 7
589	    >>> shared_prefix_len = 8192
590	    >>> unique_kv_page_indices = torch.arange(max_num_pages).int().to("cuda:0")
591	    >>> unique_kv_page_indptr = torch.tensor(
592	    ...     [0, 17, 29, 44, 48, 66, 100, 128], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
593	    ... )
594	    >>> # 1 <= kv_last_page_len <= page_size
595	    >>> unique_kv_last_page_len = torch.tensor(
596	    ...     [1, 7, 14, 4, 3, 1, 16], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
597	    ... )
598	    >>> unique_kv_cache_at_layer = [
599	    ...     torch.randn(
600	    ...         max_num_pages, 2, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda:0"
601	    ...     ) for _ in range(num_layers)
602	    ... ]
603	    >>> shared_k_data_at_layer = [
604	    ...     torch.randn(
605	    ...         shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda:0"
606	    ...     ) for _ in range(num_layers)
607	    ... ]
608	    >>> shared_v_data_at_layer = [
609	    ...     torch.randn(
610	    ...         shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda:0"
611	    ...     ) for _ in range(num_layers)
612	    ... ]
613	    >>> # create auxiliary data structures for batch decode attention
614	    >>> wrapper.begin_forward(
615	    ...     unique_kv_page_indptr,
616	    ...     unique_kv_page_indices,
617	    ...     unique_kv_last_page_len,
618	    ...     num_qo_heads,
619	    ...     num_kv_heads,
620	    ...     head_dim,
621	    ...     page_size,
622	    ...     data_type=torch.float16
623	    ... )
624	    >>> outputs = []
625	    >>> for i in range(num_layers):
626	    ...     q = torch.randn(batch_size, num_qo_heads, head_dim).half().to("cuda:0")
627	    ...     k_shared = shared_k_data_at_layer[i]
628	    ...     v_shared = shared_v_data_at_layer[i]
629	    ...     unique_kv_cache = unique_kv_cache_at_layer[i]
630	    ...     # compute batch decode attention, reuse auxiliary data structures for all layers
631	    ...     o = wrapper.forward(q, k_shared, v_shared, unique_kv_cache)
632	    ...     outputs.append(o)
633	    ...
634	    >>> outputs[0].shape
635	    torch.Size([7, 64, 128])
636	
637	    Note
638	    ----
639	    To accelerate computation, FlashInfer's shared prefix batch decode attention creates
640	    some auxiliary data structures, these data structures can be reused across multiple
641	    batch decode attention calls (e.g. different Transformer layers). This wrapper class
642	    manages the lifecycle of these data structures.
643	    """
644	
645	    @flashinfer_api
646	    def __init__(
647	        self, float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor, kv_layout: str = "NHD"
648	    ) -> None:
649	        r"""Allocate workspace for shared-prefix batch decode attention.
650	
651	        Parameters
652	        ----------
653	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
654	            User-provided float workspace buffer (e.g. 128 MiB) on the same CUDA device as
655	            the inputs.  Shared with the underlying :class:`BatchDecodeWithPagedKVCacheWrapper`.
656	        kv_layout : str
657	            Layout of the KV-cache tensors, either ``"NHD"`` or ``"HND"``.  Defaults to
658	            ``"NHD"``.
659	        """
660	        self._batch_decode_wrapper = BatchDecodeWithPagedKVCacheWrapper(
661	            float_workspace_buffer, kv_layout
662	        )
663	        self._kv_layout = kv_layout
664	
665	    def reset_workspace_buffer(
666	        self, float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor, int_workspace_buffer
667	    ) -> None:
668	        r"""Reset the workspace buffer.
669	
670	        Parameters
671	        ----------
672	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
673	            The new float workspace buffer, the device of the new float workspace buffer should
674	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
675	
676	        int_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
677	            The new int workspace buffer, the device of the new int workspace buffer should
678	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
679	        """
680	        self._batch_decode_wrapper.reset_workspace_buffer(
681	            float_workspace_buffer, int_workspace_buffer
682	        )
683	
684	    @flashinfer_api
685	    def begin_forward(
686	        self,
687	        unique_kv_indptr: torch.Tensor,
688	        unique_kv_indices: torch.Tensor,
689	        unique_kv_last_page_len: torch.Tensor,
690	        num_qo_heads: int,
691	        num_kv_heads: int,
692	        head_dim: int,
693	        page_size: int,
694	        data_type: str = "float16",
695	    ) -> None:
696	        r"""Plan shared-prefix batch decode attention for given problem specification.
697	
698	        Parameters
699	        ----------
700	        unique_kv_indptr : torch.Tensor
701	            CSR-style page offsets into ``unique_kv_indices`` for the *per-request*
702	            (non-shared) suffix of each KV cache, shape ``[batch_size + 1]``, dtype
703	            ``int32``.
704	        unique_kv_indices : torch.Tensor
705	            Page indices of the non-shared suffix of the paged KV cache,
706	            shape ``[unique_kv_indptr[-1]]``, dtype ``int32``.
707	        unique_kv_last_page_len : torch.Tensor
708	            Number of valid entries on the last page of each request's unique
709	            suffix, shape ``[batch_size]``, dtype ``int32``.
710	        num_qo_heads : int
711	            The number of query/output heads
712	        num_kv_heads : int
713	            The number of key/value heads
714	        head_dim : int
715	            The dimension of the heads
716	        page_size : int
717	            The page size of the paged kv cache
718	        data_type : Union[str, torch.dtype]
719	            The data type of the paged kv cache
720	
721	        Note
722	        ----
723	        The :meth:`begin_forward` method should be called before any :meth:`forward` or
724	        :meth:`forward_return_lse` calls,
725	        auxiliary data structures will be created during this call and cached for
726	        multiple forward calls.
727	
728	        The ``num_qo_heads`` must be a multiple of ``num_kv_heads``. If ``num_qo_heads``
729	        is not equal to ``num_kv_heads``, the function will use
730	        `grouped query attention <https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.13245>`_.
731	
732	
733	        See Also
734	        --------
735	        MultiLevelCascadeAttentionWrapper
736	        """
737	        self._batch_decode_wrapper.begin_forward(
738	            unique_kv_indptr,
739	            unique_kv_indices,
740	            unique_kv_last_page_len,
741	            num_qo_heads,
742	            num_kv_heads,
743	            head_dim,
744	            page_size,
745	            pos_encoding_mode="NONE",
746	            data_type=data_type,
747	        )
748	
749	    @flashinfer_api
750	    def forward(
751	        self,
752	        q: torch.Tensor,
753	        k_shared: torch.Tensor,
754	        v_shared: torch.Tensor,
755	        unique_kv_cache: torch.Tensor,
756	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
757	        r"""Compute batch decode attention between queries and shared-prefix paged
758	        kv-cache.
759	
760	        Parameters
761	        ----------
762	        q : torch.Tensor
763	            The query tensor, shape: ``[batch_size, num_qo_heads, head_dim]``.
764	        k_shared : torch.Tensor
765	            The shared prefix key tensor, shape:
766	            ``[shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is
767	            ``NHD``, or ``[num_kv_heads, shared_prefix_len, head_dim]`` if
768	            :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``.
769	        v_shared : torch.Tensor
770	            The shared prefix value tensor, shape:
771	            ``[shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is
772	            ``NHD``, or ``[num_kv_heads, shared_prefix_len, head_dim]`` if
773	            :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``.
774	        unique_kv_cache : Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]]
775	            The request-independent suffix paged KV-Cache stored as a tuple of tensors or a single tensor:
776	
777	            * a tuple ``(k_cache, v_cache)`` of 4-D tensors, each with shape:
778	              ``[max_num_pages, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is ``NHD``,
779	              and ``[max_num_pages, num_kv_heads, page_size, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``.
780	
781	            * a single 5-D tensor with shape:
782	              ``[max_num_pages, 2, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if
783	              :attr:`kv_layout` is ``NHD``, and
784	              ``[max_num_pages, 2, num_kv_heads, page_size, head_dim]`` if
785	              :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``. Where ``paged_kv_cache[:, 0]`` is the key-cache and
786	              ``paged_kv_cache[:, 1]`` is the value-cache.
787	
788	        Returns
789	        -------
790	        V : torch.Tensor
791	            The attention output, shape: ``[batch_size, num_heads, head_dim]``
792	        """
793	        V_shared, S_shared = single_prefill_with_kv_cache(
794	            q,
795	            k_shared,
796	            v_shared,
797	            causal=False,
798	            pos_encoding_mode="NONE",
799	            kv_layout=self._kv_layout,
800	            sm_scale=self._batch_decode_wrapper._sm_scale,
801	            rope_scale=self._batch_decode_wrapper._rope_scale,
802	            rope_theta=self._batch_decode_wrapper._rope_theta,
803	            return_lse=True,
804	        )
805	        V_unique, S_unique = self._batch_decode_wrapper.forward_return_lse(
806	            q,
807	            unique_kv_cache,
808	            pos_encoding_mode="NONE",
809	        )
810	        merge_state_in_place(V_shared, S_shared, V_unique, S_unique)
811	        return V_shared
812	
813	    @flashinfer_api
814	    def end_forward(self) -> None:
815	        r"""Warning: this function is deprecated and has no effect"""
816	        pass
817	
818	
819	class BatchPrefillWithSharedPrefixPagedKVCacheWrapper:
820	    r"""Wrapper class for prefill/append attention with shared-prefix paged kv-cache for
821	    batch of requests.
822	
823	    Check :ref:`our tutorial<kv-layout>` for paged kv-cache layout.
824	
825	    Warning
826	    -------
827	    This API will be deprecated in the future, please use
828	    :class:`MultiLevelCascadeAttentionWrapper` instead.
829	
830	    Example
831	    -------
832	    >>> import torch
833	    >>> import flashinfer
834	    >>> num_layers = 32
835	    >>> num_qo_heads = 64
836	    >>> num_kv_heads = 16
837	    >>> head_dim = 128
838	    >>> max_num_pages = 128
839	    >>> page_size = 16
840	    >>> # allocate 128MB workspace buffer
841	    >>> workspace_buffer = torch.empty(128 * 1024 * 1024, dtype=torch.uint8, device="cuda:0")
842	    >>> prefill_wrapper = flashinfer.BatchPrefillWithSharedPrefixPagedKVCacheWrapper(
843	    ...     workspace_buffer, "NHD"
844	    ... )
845	    >>> batch_size = 7
846	    >>> shared_prefix_len = 8192
847	    >>> nnz_qo = 100
848	    >>> qo_indptr = torch.tensor(
849	    ...     [0, 33, 44, 55, 66, 77, 88, nnz_qo], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
850	    ... )
851	    >>> paged_kv_indices = torch.arange(max_num_pages).int().to("cuda:0")
852	    >>> paged_kv_indptr = torch.tensor(
853	    ...     [0, 17, 29, 44, 48, 66, 100, 128], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
854	    ... )
855	    >>> # 1 <= paged_kv_last_page_len <= page_size
856	    >>> paged_kv_last_page_len= torch.tensor(
857	    ...     [1, 7, 14, 4, 3, 1, 16], dtype=torch.int32, device="cuda:0"
858	    ... )
859	    >>> kv_cache_at_layer = [
860	    ...     torch.randn(
861	    ...         max_num_pages, 2, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda:0"
862	    ...     ) for _ in range(num_layers)
863	    ... ]
864	    >>> shared_k_data_at_layer = [
865	    ...     torch.randn(
866	    ...         shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda:0"
867	    ...     ) for _ in range(num_layers)
868	    ... ]
869	    >>> shared_v_data_at_layer = [
870	    ...     torch.randn(
871	    ...         shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim, dtype=torch.float16, device="cuda:0"
872	    ...     ) for _ in range(num_layers)
873	    ... ]
874	    >>> # create auxiliary data structures for batch prefill attention
875	    >>> prefill_wrapper.begin_forward(
876	    ...     qo_indptr,
877	    ...     paged_kv_indptr,
878	    ...     paged_kv_indices,
879	    ...     paged_kv_last_page_len,
880	    ...     num_qo_heads,
881	    ...     num_kv_heads,
882	    ...     head_dim,
883	    ...     page_size,
884	    ... )
885	    >>> outputs = []
886	    >>> for i in range(num_layers):
887	    ...     q = torch.randn(nnz_qo, num_qo_heads, head_dim).half().to("cuda:0")
888	    ...     kv_cache = kv_cache_at_layer[i]
889	    ...     k_shared = shared_k_data_at_layer[i]
890	    ...     v_shared = shared_v_data_at_layer[i]
891	    ...     # compute batch prefill attention, reuse auxiliary data structures
892	    ...     o = prefill_wrapper.forward(
893	    ...         q, k_shared, v_shared, kv_cache, causal=True
894	    ...     )
895	    ...     outputs.append(o)
896	    ...
897	    s[0].shape>>> # clear auxiliary data structures
898	    >>> prefill_wrapper.end_forward()
899	    >>> outputs[0].shape
900	    torch.Size([100, 64, 128])
901	
902	    Note
903	    ----
904	    To accelerate computation, FlashInfer's shared-prefix batch prefill/append attention
905	    operators creates some auxiliary data structures, these data structures can be
906	    reused across multiple prefill/append attention calls (e.g. different Transformer
907	    layers). This wrapper class manages the lifecycle of these data structures.
908	    """
909	
910	    @flashinfer_api
911	    def __init__(
912	        self, float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor, kv_layout: str = "NHD"
913	    ) -> None:
914	        r"""Constructor of :class:`BatchDecodeWithSharedPrefixPagedKVCacheWrapper`.
915	
916	        Parameters
917	        ----------
918	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
919	            The user reserved float workspace buffer used to store intermediate attention results
920	            in the split-k algorithm. The recommended size is 128MB, the device of the workspace
921	            buffer should be the same as the device of the input tensors.
922	        kv_layout : str
923	            The layout of the input k/v tensors, could be either ``NHD`` or ``HND``.
924	        """
925	        self._batch_prefill_wrapper = BatchPrefillWithPagedKVCacheWrapper(
926	            float_workspace_buffer, kv_layout
927	        )
928	        self._kv_layout = kv_layout
929	
930	    def reset_workspace_buffer(
931	        self, float_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor, int_workspace_buffer: torch.Tensor
932	    ) -> None:
933	        r"""Reset the workspace buffer.
934	
935	        Parameters
936	        ----------
937	        float_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
938	            The new float workspace buffer, the device of the new float workspace buffer should
939	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
940	
941	        int_workspace_buffer : torch.Tensor
942	            The new int workspace buffer, the device of the new int workspace buffer should
943	            be the same as the device of the input tensors.
944	        """
945	        self._batch_prefill_wrapper.reset_workspace_buffer(
946	            float_workspace_buffer, int_workspace_buffer
947	        )
948	
949	    @flashinfer_api
950	    def begin_forward(
951	        self,
952	        qo_indptr: torch.Tensor,
953	        paged_kv_indptr: torch.Tensor,
954	        paged_kv_indices: torch.Tensor,
955	        paged_kv_last_page_len: torch.Tensor,
956	        num_qo_heads: int,
957	        num_kv_heads: int,
958	        head_dim: int,
959	        page_size: int,
960	    ) -> None:
961	        r"""Create auxiliary data structures for shared-prefix batch prefill/append
962	        attention for multiple forward calls within the same prefill/append step.
963	
964	        Parameters
965	        ----------
966	        qo_indptr : torch.Tensor
967	            The indptr of the query/output tensor, shape: ``[batch_size + 1]``.
968	        paged_kv_indptr : torch.Tensor
969	            The indptr of the paged kv-cache, shape: ``[batch_size + 1]``.
970	        paged_kv_indices : torch.Tensor
971	            The page indices of the paged kv-cache, shape: ``[qo_indptr[-1]]``.
972	        paged_kv_last_page_len : torch.Tensor
973	            The number of entries in the last page of each request in the paged
974	            kv-cache, shape: ``[batch_size]``.
975	        num_qo_heads : int
976	            The number of query/output heads.
977	        num_kv_heads : int
978	            The number of key/value heads.
979	        head_dim : int
980	            The dimension of the heads.
981	        page_size : int
982	            The page size of the paged kv-cache.
983	
984	        Note
985	        ----
986	        The :meth:`begin_forward` method should be called before any :meth:`forward`
987	        or :meth:`forward_return_lse` calls, auxiliary data structures will be created
988	        during this call and cached for multiple forward calls.
989	
990	        The ``num_qo_heads`` must be a multiple of ``num_kv_heads``. If ``num_qo_heads``
991	        is not equal to ``num_kv_heads``, the function will use
992	        `grouped query attention <https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.13245>`_.
993	        """
994	        self._batch_prefill_wrapper.begin_forward(
995	            qo_indptr,
996	            paged_kv_indptr,
997	            paged_kv_indices,
998	            paged_kv_last_page_len,
999	            num_qo_heads,
1000	            num_kv_heads,
1001	            head_dim,
1002	            page_size,
1003	        )
1004	
1005	    @flashinfer_api
1006	    def forward(
1007	        self,
1008	        q: torch.Tensor,
1009	        k_shared: torch.Tensor,
1010	        v_shared: torch.Tensor,
1011	        unique_kv_cache: torch.Tensor,
1012	        causal: bool = False,
1013	        use_fp16_qk_reduction: bool = False,
1014	        sm_scale: Optional[float] = None,
1015	        rope_scale: Optional[float] = None,
1016	        rope_theta: Optional[float] = None,
1017	    ) -> torch.Tensor:
1018	        r"""Compute batch prefill/append attention between query and shared-prefix paged
1019	        kv-cache.
1020	
1021	        Parameters
1022	        ----------
1023	        q : torch.Tensor
1024	            The query tensor, shape: ``[qo_indptr[-1], num_qo_heads, head_dim]``.
1025	        k_shared : torch.Tensor
1026	            The shared prefix key tensor, shape:
1027	            ``[shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is
1028	            ``NHD``, or ``[num_kv_heads, shared_prefix_len, head_dim]`` if
1029	            :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``.
1030	        v_shared : torch.Tensor
1031	            The shared prefix value tensor, shape:
1032	            ``[shared_prefix_len, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is
1033	            ``NHD``, or ``[num_kv_heads, shared_prefix_len, head_dim]`` if
1034	            :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``.
1035	        unique_kv_cache : Union[torch.Tensor, Tuple[torch.Tensor, torch.Tensor]]
1036	            The request-independent suffix paged KV-Cache stored as a tuple of tensors or a single tensor:
1037	
1038	            * a tuple ``(k_cache, v_cache)`` of 4-D tensors, each with shape:
1039	              ``[max_num_pages, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is ``NHD``,
1040	              and ``[max_num_pages, num_kv_heads, page_size, head_dim]`` if :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``.
1041	
1042	            * a single 5-D tensor with shape:
1043	              ``[max_num_pages, 2, page_size, num_kv_heads, head_dim]`` if
1044	              :attr:`kv_layout` is ``NHD``, and
1045	              ``[max_num_pages, 2, num_kv_heads, page_size, head_dim]`` if
1046	              :attr:`kv_layout` is ``HND``. Where ``paged_kv_cache[:, 0]`` is the key-cache and
1047	              ``paged_kv_cache[:, 1]`` is the value-cache.
1048	
1049	        causal : bool
1050	            Whether to apply causal mask on the attention matrix.
1051	        use_fp16_qk_reduction : bool
1052	            Whether to use f16 for qk reduction (faster at the cost of slight precision
1053	            loss).
1054	        sm_scale : Optional[float]
1055	            The scale of softmax, if not provided, will be set to ``1 / sqrt(head_dim)``.
1056	        rope_scale : Optional[float]
1057	            The scale used in RoPE interpolation, if not provided, will be set to
1058	            ``1.0``.
1059	        rope_theta : Optional[float]
1060	            The theta used in RoPE, if not provided, will be set to ``1e4``.
1061	
1062	        Returns
1063	        -------
1064	        V : torch.Tensor
1065	            The attention output, shape: ``[qo_indptr[-1], num_heads, head_dim]``.
1066	
1067	        See Also
1068	        --------
1069	        MultiLevelCascadeAttentionWrapper
1070	        """
1071	        V_shared, S_shared = single_prefill_with_kv_cache(
1072	            q,
1073	            k_shared,
1074	            v_shared,
1075	            causal=False,
1076	            pos_encoding_mode="NONE",
1077	            kv_layout=self._kv_layout,
1078	            use_fp16_qk_reduction=use_fp16_qk_reduction,
1079	            sm_scale=sm_scale,
1080	            rope_scale=rope_scale,
1081	            rope_theta=rope_theta,
1082	            return_lse=True,
1083	        )
1084	        V_unique, S_unique = self._batch_prefill_wrapper.forward_return_lse(
1085	            q,
1086	            unique_kv_cache,
1087	            causal=causal,
1088	            pos_encoding_mode="NONE",
1089	            use_fp16_qk_reduction=use_fp16_qk_reduction,
1090	            sm_scale=sm_scale,
1091	            rope_scale=rope_scale,
1092	            rope_theta=rope_theta,
1093	        )
1094	        merge_state_in_place(V_shared, S_shared, V_unique, S_unique)
1095	        return V_shared
1096	
1097	    @flashinfer_api
1098	    def end_forward(self) -> None:
1099	        r"""Warning: this function is deprecated and has no effect"""
1100	        pass
